news.headline: Fed's Collins: The economy's underlying strengths are still there.
M-tron Industries posted robust results for Q4 and FY 2024 with record revenues; Q4 revenues rose by $2.0M to $12.8M.
news.summary: M-tron Industries, Inc., a leading electronic components designer and manufacturer, revealed robust financial performance for Q4 and FY 2024. In Q4 2024, the company saw a significant 18.9% revenue surge, amounting to $2.0 million, bringing total revenues to $12.8 million for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. M-tron, traded on NYSE American as MPTI, specializes in high-tech components used for signal frequency and timing control in electronic circuits.

news.headline: Vanta & U.S. Space Force introduce Quantum Esports Series for pro gamers, an American esports league.
news.summary: An announcement was made about the launch of the Quantum Esports Series Powered by the U.S. Space Force, a new esports league based in the United States. The league is set to bring together gamers and fans, creating a platform for competitive gaming.

news.headline: Floor & Decor has opened a new warehouse store in Gilroy, California with 30 associates led by Chief Executive Merchant Gee Mohammed.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Floor & Decor, a prominent retailer focused on hard-surface flooring, has revealed the launch of its latest warehouse outlet in California at 7900 Arroyo Circle in Gilroy. The new location features a warehouse store and design center, with around 30 full-time and part-time staff members. The store is overseen by Gee Mohammed, who serves as the Chief Executive Merchant. Floor & Decor, listed on NYSE as FND, has over 30 operational outlets specializing in high-growth sales of hard-surface flooring.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: It's too early to tell if data turning weaker.
Lantern Pharma (NASDAQ: LTRN) reports Q4 & year-end 2024 financial results, highlights AI platform for oncology drugs.
news.summary: In Dallas, Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN) shared its financial performance for Q4 and full year 2024, along with insights on their AI technology, RADR®. The company, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm, utilizes RADR® AI and ML platform to revolutionize oncology drug research and development, expediting timelines and reducing costs. As of December 31, 2024, the company reported its financial results, showcasing progress on AI-driven drug candidates within their portfolio and the advancements made utilizing the RADR® platform for precision oncology drug development.

news.headline: Lumentum to showcase optical innovations at OFC 2025 in San Francisco, latest products & tech at booth #2119.
news.summary: A company, Lumentum Holdings Inc., will showcase its cutting-edge optical networking solutions at the Optical Fiber Communications Conference and Exhibition (OFC) 2025 in San Francisco from March 30 to April 3. As a leading global provider of optical and photonic products for cloud and networking industries, Lumentum will highlight its advancements in high-speed data interconnect products and technologies, optical circuit switching (OCS), high-power pump lasers, and more at booth #2119. This event will serve as a platform for Lumentum to demonstrate its latest innovations to industry professionals and stakeholders.

news.headline: Domo partners with HCVue to enhance HR insights with data and AI, helping HR professionals consolidate data efficiently.
news.summary: In Utah, Silicon Slopes, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) has revealed a new collaboration with Human Capital Vue (HCVue), a prominent human capital management data solutions provider affiliated with UKG. This alliance aims to utilize Domo's data products and AI platform to empower HR professionals with rapid insights and integrated reporting tools. By securely consolidating data from various sources, HCVue's partnership with Domo seeks to offer valuable support to HR teams in their operations.

news.headline: Paycom wins Most Trustworthy Company in America Award for fourth year in a row by Newsweek for 2025.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Paycom has been recognized as one of the Most Trustworthy Companies in America for the year 2025 according to Newsweek.

news.headline: Braze to acquire OfferFit, an AI company, for $325 million to enhance customer engagement capabilities.
news.summary: Braze (Nasdaq: BRZE) has recently revealed its acquisition of OfferFit, an AI decisioning company, in a deal worth $325 million. This marks a significant move for Braze, a leading customer engagement platform that aims to enhance brand interactions. The purchase of OfferFit will enable Braze to leverage AI decisioning agents that can independently test, learn, and provide tailored, personalized experiences for customers. The agreement is pending customary closing adjustments before finalization. In September 2024, Braze had previously outlined its vision for employing agentic AI in customer engagement strategies, showcasing continued evolution in their approach to enhancing brand-consumer relationships.

news.headline: Blaize Holdings (NASDAQ:BZAI) reports fiscal year 2024 financial results after business combination with BurTech Acquisition Corp. CEO Dinakar Munagala pleased with outcome.
news.summary: In El Dorado Hills, California, Blaize Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:BZAI) has announced its financial results for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. Blaize is a provider of specialized artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled edge computing solutions that combine software and silicon to enhance AI efficiency from the edge to the core. Following a business combination with BurTech Acquisition Corp. in January 2025, Blaize CEO Dinakar Munagala expressed satisfaction with the outcome.

news.headline: NetApp CFO Mike Berry nominated for Calix board of directors. Will bring industry expertise. Transaction subject to final approval.
news.summary: Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) based in San Jose, California, has revealed the nomination of Mike Berry, formerly the CFO of NetApp, to its board of directors. Berry, known for his extensive experience in finance within the industry, is poised to offer valuable insights as Calix progresses in revolutionizing the broadband sector with its acclaimed innovation range. Once Berry joins the board, Calix will further its commitment to supporting broadband experience providers (BXPs) across the board.

news.headline: Virtus AI & Tech Opportunities Fund (NYSE: AIO) declares $0.15 monthly distribution, to be paid on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut, the Virtus Artificial Intelligence & Technology Opportunities Fund (NYSE: AIO) recently disclosed a monthly distribution on November 20, 2024. The distribution per share will be $0.15 and will be paid on March 28, 2025, to shareholders of record on March 13, 2025. This distribution is part of the Fund's Managed Distribution Plan, aiming to sustain a steady distribution level that can be funded from net investment income and realized capital gains.

news.headline: Discover Financial Services to report Q1 2025 earnings on April 23, 2025, with conference call on April 24, 2025 at 7:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: Discover Financial Services (NYSE: DFS) based in Riverwoods, Illinois, is set to announce its First quarter 2025 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, April 23, 2025. Interested parties can access the earnings release on Discover's Investor Relations website. A conference call to review the results and pertinent topics is scheduled for Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. Central Time. The call will feature prepared remarks and will be available through a live audio web broadcast.

news.headline: Cloudflare adds 3 new board members: Stacey Cunningham, John Graham-Cumming, and Dr. Karim Lakhani. CEO excited for appointments.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Cloudflare, Inc. disclosed the appointment of three new members to its board of directors: Stacey Cunningham, ex-President of the New York Stock Exchange; John Graham-Cumming, previous CTO at Cloudflare; and Dr. Karim Lakhani, Harvard Business School's Professor of Business Administration. The company's co-founder and CEO, Matthew Prince, expressed enthusiasm about the appointments. Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) is a prominent connectivity cloud company.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: Federal layoffs are still small relative to aggregate size of labor market.
Fed's Collins: Economic uncertainty causes businesses to pull back.
Pediatric Interventional Cardiology market to reach US$4.34 billion by 2033, from US$2.42 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 6.68%. - ResearchAndMarkets.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Pediatric Interventional Cardiology Market by ResearchAndMarkets.com predicts significant growth in the sector. The market is expected to rise from US$2.42 billion in 2024 to US$4.34 billion by 2033, reflecting a notable CAGR of 6.68% during the period from 2025 to 2033. This surge in growth is attributed to advancements in technology and innovation. The report covers detailed analysis based on device type, procedures, end-use, countries, and company insights.

news.headline: TherapeuticsMD reports 2024 net loss of $(2.3) million, reduced from $(7.7) million in continuing operations.
news.summary: TherapeuticsMD, Inc., a pharmaceutical royalties company, disclosed its financial performance for the full year ending December 31, 2024. The net loss from continuing operations for the year was $(2.3) million, equating to $(0.20) per basic and diluted common share. This marked a $5.4 million improvement from the previous year's net loss of $(7.7) million. TherapeuticsMD is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TXMD.

news.headline: Jack in the Box to bring iconic antenna ball to San Diego little league fields, starting April 11.
news.summary: In San Diego, Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) is extending its presence from Petco Park to local little league fields, aiming to inspire young baseball players. The company will place its renowned antenna ball representing Jack's head on foul poles in several San Diego little league fields. The initiative begins this spring, with the first installation scheduled for April 11 at 425 Imperial Bea. This move signifies a unique collaboration between a major corporation and grassroots baseball, enhancing the experience for young sluggers and their families.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: Price expectations get more vital with more tariffs.
Fed's Collins: Watching inflation expectations is important right now.
IZEA's Q4 2024 revenue reached $11.0 million, representing a 24% increase.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, IZEA Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ: IZEA), a prominent influencer marketing firm offering Creator Economy solutions to marketers, disclosed its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and the full year concluding on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: If tariffs keep coming, different trajectory on prices.
Fed's Collins: The baseline outlook is one-off tariff hit to inflation.
Lulus announces Q4 and FY 2024 financial performance, exceeding revenue targets.
news.summary: The United States has reported a total of 35,000 new COVID-19 cases today. This marks a significant increase from yesterday's 25,000 cases. Health officials are concerned about the rising numbers and are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing. In addition, there have been a total of 500 new deaths related to the virus today, bringing the national death toll to 150,000. These numbers highlight the importance of taking precautions to slow the spread of the virus and protect vulnerable populations.

news.headline: KULR stock surges post strong Q4 results: Revenue $3.37M, EPS -2 cents in line with estimates.
news.summary: KULR Technology Group, Inc. (AMEX:KULR) announced its Q4 results post market closure on Thursday. The financials include a GAAP loss of $0.02 per share, meeting the analyst forecast. Revenue for the quarter stood at $3.37 million, surpassing the expected $2.9 million. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: I expect the Fed will likely hold rates steady for longer given outlook.
Fed's Collins: Holding rates steady for longer time seems appropriate.
NAMI expresses concerns over proposed HHS overhaul, citing potential impact on staff and structure changes.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on March 27, 2025, the National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) issued a statement regarding the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) restructuring plan. The plan involves significant staff and structural modifications aimed at improving the agency's effectiveness. Key details include a major overhaul of personnel and organizational setup to enhance operations and services related to mental health. This initiative marks a pivotal moment for mental health advocacy and service delivery, signaling a significant shift in the approach taken by HHS to address mental health issues.

Fed's Collins: Inflation risks are on the upside.
Fed's Collins: I strongly supported the Fed's decision to hold rates steady.
Trump Budget Director Vought: We're considering a recission package.
Fed's Collins: It's inevitable tariffs will increase inflation in the near term.
Corporación América Airports files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC. Report available on SEC and company website.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based Corporación América Airports S.A. (NYSE: CAAP), a major private airport operator globally, has disclosed the submission of its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The report encompasses the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, and interested individuals can access it on the SEC website (www.sec.gov) or the Company's investor relations webpage (http://investors.corp).

news.headline: Caliber launches new 1031 Exchange program in Scottsdale, AZ, offering investors access to real estate opportunities with tax deferral.
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona - Caliber has introduced a new 1031 Exchange program, offering investors the chance to explore real estate investment options and postpone taxes.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: Inflation had come down but was still elevated at start of year.
Fed's Collins: The outlook now is much cloudier for inflation and growth.
Bitcoin miners eye AI's potential, but grapple with hurdles in the sector, poised to hit $12.3 billion by 2025.
Intermap reveals financial results for 2024 and provides guidance for 2025.
Fed's Collins: The economy started 2025 in a good place.
TransCode Therapeutics doses first patient in fourth cohort of Phase 1 trial with TTX-MC138, total of ten patients treated so far without major safety issues.
news.summary: The latest update reports that the first patient in the fourth cohort has received treatment with TTX-MC138. So far, a total of ten patients have undergone treatment with TTX-MC138, with doses progressively increasing. More patients are currently being assessed for potential inclusion in the expanded enrollment. Encouragingly, there have been no notable safety issues or toxicities that limit the dosage reported. This development is from Boston.

news.headline: Faraday Future discloses Q4 and full-year 2024 results, raised $70 million in funding for FF and FX projects.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI), a global intelligent electric mobility company, released its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company secured over $70 million in funding from two rounds in September and December 2024 to bolster its FF and FX strategic initiatives. Throughout the year, Faraday Future made noteworthy advancements.

news.headline: Aeva announces Katherine Motlagh joining the Board of Directors as of March 27, 2025. Leader in LiDAR technology.
news.summary: Aeva® (Nasdaq: AEVA), a pioneer in advanced sensing and perception systems, revealed the addition of Katherine Motlagh to its Board of Directors on March 27, 2025. Mina Rezk, Chairman and CTO at Aeva, expressed enthusiasm about the appointment as the company prepares to commercialize its innovative 4D LiDAR technology. Katherine will bring valuable expertise to drive Aeva's growth strategy.

news.headline: Fed's Collins: I'm cautiously and realistically optimistic about the economy.
RBC's CEO: RBC sees possible recession, but not a base-case scenario.

Toronto Pearson airport saw 4.4% increase in passengers to 46.8 million in 2024, with 7.5% growth in international travel. CEO cited achievements and new airlines. The airport is investing in a 10-year plan called Pearson LIFT to accommodate future growth. Key passenger and financial numbers showed positive trends compared to previous years.
news.summary: The Greater Toronto Airports Authority reported strong financial results for 2024, with Toronto Pearson seeing a 4.4% increase in passenger volumes to 46.8 million compared to 2023. International travel grew by 7.5%, showcasing Pearson's status as North America's most internationally connected airport. Seven new airlines began operations at Pearson, and the airport was recognized as North America's Best Airport Over 40 Million Passengers. The strategic plan includes Pearson LIFT, a long-term capital program to accommodate passenger growth. GTAA is investing in digital transformation and new technologies. Key financial figures for 2024 include 16.4 million domestic passengers, with a slight decrease from 2023. The GTAA is also monitoring geopolitical events for economic impacts.

news.headline: Coeur CFO to present at Mining Forum Europe in Zurich on April 1, 2025 at 11:20 a.m. CET. Visit www.coeur.com for materials.
news.summary: Coeur Mining, Inc.’s Senior VP and CFO, Thomas S. Whelan, is set to speak at Mining Forum Europe in Zurich, Switzerland on April 1, 2025, at 11:20 a.m. CET. This conference, by invitation only, will feature Coeur presenting their materials at www.coeur.com. Coeur Mining, Inc., a U.S.-based company (NYSE: CDE), will discuss its diversified operations at the forum.

news.headline: Lazydays Holdings, Inc. (NasdaqCM: GORV) announces release of Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Lazydays Holdings, Inc., a company listed on NasdaqCM under the ticker symbol GORV, is set to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 by March 31, 2025, before the market opens in Tampa, Florida. The announcement will be followed by a conference call on the same day.
